titleStmt.title: SII 18.44: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 44. (B.K. No. 124 of 1932-33.) KAḶḶIHĀḶ, HAVERI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab in front of the temple of Durgā-Paramēśvarī.

summary.p: This inscription, belonging to the reign of Jagadēkamalla Jayasiṁha, is dated in Śaka 941, Siddhārtha, Uttarāyaṇa-Saṁkrānti. The month, tithi and the week-day are not given. In the cyclic year Siddhārtha, the Uttarāyaṇa-Saṁkrānti occurred on Thursday, A.D. 1019, December 24.

It states that when Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Kundarāja was governing Banavāsi Twelve-thousand, his wife Jōgabbe, who was administering Ajjaḍi, made a grant of and to the temple of Sahadēvēs11vara. The construction of the temple is stated to have been begun by Sahadēva in Śaka 919, (randhra-chandra-nidhi) when he was the gāvuṇḍa of Ajjaḍi. Jōgabbe is stated to be the daughter of Barma and anu-sute of Rāchamalla. The gift was made at the request of Rāchamalla, who became Seṭṭivāḷa after his elder brother Sahadēva.

The record refers to the construction of a temple by Rāchamalla and also records the grant of land made by Sahadēva at the time of laying the foundation stone (kesar-kal) of the temple. Names are also mentioned of four dancing girls dedicated to the service of the temple by Sādēvayya (i.e., Sahadēvayya).

Mention is made of a certain Mummuni as an adversary of Kundarasa. It is not impossible that this Mummuni is the same as Mummuṇi of the Silāhāra family of Northern Konkaṇ. The earliest date, however, so far known, of this Mummuṇi is A.D. 1049.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śivāya śivalabdhayē gaṇēśāya namassarvvaśarmma nirmmāṇasiddhayē .
ya śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭāraka
śrī majjagadēkamalla jayasiṁhadēvara vijayarājya doḷ
bda mahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ vairighaṭākēsari ripukuṁjarāṁ kuśaṁ
śrīmatkuṁdarājaṁ banavāsi panircchāsiramumānāḷuttamiḻdu . vṛttaṁ . migaluṁ mīṟalumittanilla ri
pubhūbhṛccakramaṁ vīravṛttige koṇḍāṭada maṇḍaḷēśvara mahāsāmantaroḷtāne jeṭṭiganādōṁ
jasamoppe diggajaghaṭāghāṭaṁbaraṁ cakravartige sarvvōrvvareyaṁ nimircci negeḻdaṁ śrīvīravidyādharaṁ .
© Uripalmuggēriyaṁ muṁmuniya masakamaṁ maṟgisalkanyakubjēśvaranaṁ hē myādriyaṁ pāyisaloḍa
risuvaṁ . cāru cālukyarājyasthiralakṣmīrakṣakaṁ . kōśaḷakuḷakuḷiśaṁ . laṁjikābhaṁjanaṁ . gūrjaravajraṁ . cōḷakāḷāśa
ni malayamahīmarddanaṁ kuṁdarājaṁ . kaṁ . kuṁdana kulalalane jagadvaṁdite jōgabbe rūpavati guṇavati pūrṇnēṁdu
mukhi saṁda barmmana naṁdane vibhu rācamallananusute negaḻdaḷ . v® . neṭṭane rūpavibhra make dānada dharmmada rūḍhiguṁ
te bāyviṭṭu niraṁtaraṁ paḍeva kāṁteyarā vadhu koṭṭa dānamaṁ koṭṭaro puṭṭuvaṁdo ḍane puṭṭidaro sati paṭṭa toṭṭiloḷ paṭṭa
manōṁtaro negaḷda jōgaladēviya nōṁta nōṁpiyaṁ . va . Ā paramēśvariyajjaḍi yanāḷuttamire tatprapañcadiṁ muṁne . kaṁ .
© bīraṁ tyāgasuradrumasāraṁ (.) kavigamakivādivāgmijanakkādhāraṁ muṁnina śūdrakavīraṁ pratyakṣamenisi
negaḻdanudāraṁ . v® . keḷeyaṁgāśritanādavaṁgeredavaṁgiṣṭaṁge śiṣṭaṁge mokkaḷameṁbaṁtire baṭṭeyoḷ
beḷedakai kāṁtāradoḷ beḷedu bhūtaḷavaṁ mōduva māmaraṁ (.) taḷiya kūḷvēśyōpa bhōgaṁ (.) nadīsalilaṁ kō
ya jēṁ svakīyadhanamēṁ bīraṁ mahādāniyō . Ā puruṣaratnaṁge pavitrakaḷatra menisi vṛ nṛtanu
vyāptiyoḷiḻdaruṁdhati (.) jagatpratyakṣadharmādhidēvate (.) kāḷēyayugāvatāriṇi dharitrījāte (.) bhā
svatpativratatējaṟpunarukta gauri (.) dhariṇīsāvitriyeṁbī mahōṁnatiyiṁ saṁdasagabbe rūpaguṇadiṁ
strīratnamī dhātriyoḷ . kaṁ . Ā daṁpatige magaṁ puṇyōdayanene puṭṭi (.) cāgi kali satyavacō
vādiyene negaḻdu peṁpiṁ sādēvane dēvanenisidaṁ vasumatiyoḷ . v® . karamudv®ttate
yiṁ baḷaṁjigara phoṁgaṁ maymegaṁ tappalirppara (.) darpōddhatiyiṁ baḷaṁjigara peṇgaṁ maṇgamaḻkarta
vaṁdira niṭṭelvugaḷaṁ nimircci sahadēvaṁ (.) nāḍe koṇḍāḍe kēsariśauryyaṁ sale seṭṭivuttanene saṁdī rū
ḍhiyaṁ tāḷdida . mudadiṁndaṁ banavāsidēśamadu paṁnnircchāsiraṁ kūḍe māḍida peṁ poppiralaṁgacitta
mavutaṁ (.) taudāryasaṁ (.) daṁdadosad[Ī]nāḍoṁdu kavartteyartthamanituṁ nāḍīye taṁnartthamādudaṟiṁ
daṁ (.) paḍedoḷpu vṛttiyaṇuvaṁgakkuṁ peṟaṁgakkumē . kaṁ . maleyoḷ vṛttidrōhara taleyaṁ seṁḍāḍi seṭṭi
vāḻaṁ nijadōrvvalagarvvadiṁde paḍedaṁ maleyarasugaḷellamaṟiye samayada cakraṁ . v® . sakakā
laṁ sale (.) raṁdhracaṁdranidhisaṁkhyaṁ hēmalaṁbi pravarttakadoḷmaṁneya ratnamīye dayeyiṁ śrī kāvadēvaṁ gu
ṇaprakarāṁgaṁ (.) sahadēvanajjaḍiya gāvuṁḍiṁge tānēkamukhyakanādaṁde dalalli rudra bhavanaprā
raṁbhamaṁ māḍidaṁ . pusiyuṁ lōbhamumeṁba rāvalatanakkūḍāgi bōḍāgi mānasa rākārada kāge
yāgi nariyūgiḻdā naraṁ kūrttu kīrttisadirvvarṇnisuvaṁdu baṇnisusu satyōdhrī vanaṁ (.) peṁpu raṁjise saṁ
dī sahadēvanaṁ (.) budhajanakkārttīvanaṁ kāvanaṁ . kaṁ . Ātananujaṁ (.) guṇaprakhyāti yinesediḻda rāca
mallaṁ (.) vijayakhyātige nallaṁ (.) mīṟuvarātige mallaṁ kumārggacaritamanollaṁ . v® . mada navirōdhiyaṁ
nnane virōdhige bandhajanakke vajraśaiḷada naḍegōṭeyannane nijāśritaśiṣṭajanakke dēvalōka
diniḻitaṁda kalpakujadaṁnane dēśamanāḷvavaṁge sāḻcida rasasiddhiyaṁnane daleṁdapudī
dhare rācamallanaṁ . kaṁ . kaṭṭuppu viṣada madyada puṭṭida nele jaḷadhi jaḷadhiyaṁ pogaḷade nīṁ ma
ṭṭimiru rācamallaṁ kaṭṭisidaṟageṟe samudradiṁ migilalte . v® . sahadēvaṁ Npapūjya najjaḍiyo
ḷādaiśvaryyamaṁ duṣṭadussahatējaṁge nijānujaṁge mudadiṁdaṁ rācamallaṁge nirvvahi seṁdādaradiṁdamī
banavāsidēśadoḷsarvvadurvvahamaṁ neṭṭane seṭṭivāḻamahimāvaṣṭaṁbhamaṁ tāḷdidaṁ © . © . ©
© svasti śakanṛparājyākrāṁtasaṁvatsaraṁgaḷ 941 neya siddhārtthavarṣa duttarāyaṇasaṁkramaṇa
da puṇyadinadoḷ śrīmatkuṁdarājana mahādēviyar śrīmajjōgabbarasiyarajjaḍi
ya sahadēvēśvarakke gāvuṇḍa rācamallana binnapadiṁ dharmmānuraktacitteyarāgi
sarvvanamasyamāgi biṭṭa kariya kai rājamānadoḷāṟu mattar . kisumaṇnāṟu ma
ttar . gaḻdeyoṁdu mattar . Aṟunūṟu baḷḷiya tōṁṭavoṁdu . Adā paddhati . ©
© nāḻseṭṭi sahadēvayyaṁ taṁna dēgulakke kesarkallikkidaṁde (.) khaṇḍasphuṭita jīrṇnō
ddharaṇa satra caruka nimittadiṁ biṭṭa kisumaṇnu Irppattanālku mattarī dharmmamaṁ pratipā
ḷisidoṁge vijaya śrī baḷāyurārōgyābhivṛddhi yuttarōttaramakkuṁ kurukṣētra doḷa
śvamēdhaṁ geyda maṇyamakkuṁ . Idanaḷidavarggakku rōga dāridrya santaticchēdamuṁ . vāraṇāsi
yoḷ kōṭi kavileyaṁ brāhmaṇarumaṁ konda mahāpātakavumakkumallige manu vākyameṁ
tene . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasēturnṛpāṇāṁ (.) kāḷē kāḷē pālanīyō bhavadbhiḥ sarvvānēvaṁ bhāvinaḥ
pārtthivēṁdrān (.) bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmacaṁdraḥ . na viṣaṁ viṣamityā hurddēvasvaṁ viṣa
mucyatē viṣamēkākinaṁ haṁti dēvasvaṁ putrapautrikaṁ . bahubhirvvasudhā bhuktā rāja
bhissagarādibhiḥ yasya yasya yadā bhūmistasya tasya tadā phaḷaṁ © śrī kaṁdarppana kāvyaṁ ©
© svārthaparārtthameṁba nuḍi salladaḍēnene puṇyamūrtti dharmmārtti guṇārtti viśvajaga
tītaḷavarttitakīrttiyeṁdu dīnārtthijana virājise mahāpuruṣāgamadiṁ pa
rōpakārārtthamidaṁ sarīramenutirpudu gōsane rācamallana .
śrīmat leṁkamuṁja śrīmajjōgaladēviya dharmmakke tanna keṟeyaṁ biṭṭa(ḥ) .

sādēvayya
nā dēvastha
ḷakke biṭṭa
sūḷe hamma
kkanokkalu
holeyūbbe
yokkalu rā
jaṁbeyokkalu
kādaṁbeyokkalu
Intī nālvar sū
ḷeyarumelligaṁ
pōgalāgadu(ḥ) .
Adā paddhati(ṁ)
perggaḍe kāḷabbege

dēgula
va māḍi
daṁ vidyāvana
ycōjaṁ
ge dharmmamano
ppugoṭṭu biṭṭa ki
sumattarera
ḍu Idanaḷi
daṁge kavile
yanaḷida pāta
ka

vana baṁṭa bīravaṇiga sōva
giyaṁ bi .
Digital edition of SII 18.44 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
